title: 五行策(WuXing Card)
description:
Overview:
Wu Xing Strategy is a single-player card game featuring both Versus and Roguelike modes, incorporating the Chinese Five Elements. Players form card combinations to score points and challenge AI-controlled levels.

Detailed Description:

• Dual Modes:

• Versus: Face off against AI opponents, take turns drafting cards after each play, and use the relationships between the Five Elements to gain the upper hand.

• Roguelike: Discover randomly generated items and bonuses, combine them with hero abilities, and push for the highest possible score in every run.

• Hero System: Choose a hero before each game, each with unique skills and attributes that shape your strategy.

• Card Strategy: Form different hand types to trigger bonus effects and adapt your approach as the battle unfolds.

Key Features:

• Single-player Versus and Roguelike modes

• Core Five Elements strategy

• Hero skills and item synergy

• Highly strategic with strong replay value
description_short: WuXing is a strategic card game inspired by the Five Elements of Chinese philosophy. Build powerful combos by mixing hero abilities and items, chase high scores, and adapt to ever-changing battles to forge your own winning strategy
